differential_diagnoses: Iron deficiency anemia (likely gastrointestinal blood loss)
Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF)
Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease or occult interstitial lung disease
next_steps: Complete blood count with peripheral smear and iron studies
Repeat transthoracic echocardiography to assess hemodynamics of aortic stenosis
Fecal occult blood test or diagnostic colonoscopy/EGD if anemia confirmed
Cardiac catheterization or coronary CT angiography to assess coronary artery disease
Holter monitor or extended cardiac rhythm monitoring
